message:
fix: TCP combined interest, gRPC length overflow, LB bounds, semaphore zero-permit

tcp/split.rs: Use independent if-checks (not else-if) when storing
wakers for combined interest (READABLE | WRITABLE). Previously only
the read waker was updated when both interests were requested,
causing write readiness notifications to be lost.

grpc/codec.rs: Replace silent u32 truncation (as u32) with
u32::try_from().map_err() so payloads exceeding 4GB return
MessageTooLarge instead of encoding a wrong length prefix.

load_balance.rs: Add bounds check on strategy-returned index before
indexing into backends vec, returning NoBackends instead of panicking
if the strategy returns an out-of-range index.

semaphore.rs: Guard add_permits(0) in both SemaphorePermit and
OwnedSemaphorePermit Drop impls. Calling add_permits(0) is a no-op
but may acquire the internal lock unnecessarily on every drop of
a zero-count permit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
